title: Fermented Light Korean Date Stir-fry
description: This light and fermented dish features juicy dates with a tangy twist from lemon zest. Perfect for date nights or as a healthy snack option.

ingredients.name: Pinch of ground Korean fermented mustard powder (kimchi paste)
1 tablespoon honey or agave nectar (for sweetness, optional)

instructions: In a medium bowl, combine dates and lemon juice. Mix until the dates are mostly broken down into small pieces.
Add ground fermented mustard powder, honey or agave nectar (if using), and sesame oil to the bowl. Stir well.
Season with salt and taste-test for sweetness. Adjust seasoning if necessary by adding more honey or lemon juice.
Transfer the mixture onto a serving plate. Garnish with extra sesame seeds if desired.
